hooks.command:
#!/usr/bin/env sh
input=$(cat)
if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty')
elif command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | node -e "let data=''; process.stdin.setEncoding('utf8'); process.stdin.on('data', (chunk) => { data += chunk; }); process.stdin.on('end', () => { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(data); const value = parsed?.tool_input?.command; process.stdout.write(typeof value === 'string' ? value : ''); } catch { process.stdout.write(''); } });")
else
  # Escape-aware fallback parser for shells without jq/node.
  cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | awk 'BEGIN { in_cmd = 0; escaped = 0; out = "" } { for (i = 1; i <= length($0); i++) { ch = substr($0, i, 1); if (!in_cmd) { buffer = buffer ch; if (buffer ~ /"tool_input"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\{[^}]*"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"$/) { in_cmd = 1; buffer = "" } else if (length(buffer) > 256) { buffer = substr(buffer, length(buffer) - 255) } } else { if (escaped) { out = out ch; escaped = 0 } else if (ch == "\\") { escaped = 1 } else if (ch == "\"") { print out; exit } else { out = out ch } } } } END { if (!in_cmd) print "" }')
fi
cmd=$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | tr -s '[:space:]' ' ')
[ -z "$cmd" ] && exit 0
patterns="(^|[[:space:]])rm -rf([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])rm -r([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])rm --recursive([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])rm --force([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git push --force([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git push -f([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git push --force-with-lease([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git reset --hard([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git clean -fd([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git clean -f([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git branch -D([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git push([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git commit([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git commit --amend([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])git rm([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])sudo([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])npm publish([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])pnpm publish([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])cargo publish([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])twine upload([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])terraform apply([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])kubectl apply([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])kubectl delete namespace([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])Invoke-WebRequest([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])iwr([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])Invoke-RestMethod([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])irm([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])curl\\.exe([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])wget\\.exe([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])pwsh -Command([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])pwsh -c([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])pwsh -EncodedCommand([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])pwsh\\.exe -Command([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])pwsh\\.exe -c([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])pwsh\\.exe -EncodedCommand([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])powershell -Command([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])powershell -c([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])powershell -EncodedCommand([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])powershell\\.exe -Command([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])powershell\\.exe -c([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])powershell\\.exe -EncodedCommand([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])cmd /c([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])cmd /k([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])cmd\\.exe /c([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])cmd\\.exe /k([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])node -e([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])node --eval([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])python -c([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])python -m([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])python3 -c([[:space:]]|$)|(^|[[:space:]])python3 -m([[:space:]]|$)|curl .*\\| *sh|curl .*\\| *bash|wget .*\\| *sh|wget .*\\| *bash"
if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE "$patterns"; then
  printf '%s\n' "Blocked: destructive command matched guard pattern." >&2
  exit 2
fi
exit 0
